description_long: This is a classic American diner booth set, featuring two high-backed benches upholstered in red and white striped vinyl, facing each other across a rectangular table. The benches have a bold, retro aesthetic with smooth, glossy red exteriors and white vertical stripes on the seat backs and cushions. The table has a dark, glossy surface with visible stains or discolorations, supported by a single central black pedestal base. The booth seats are thickly padded, providing comfort and a sense of enclosure for diners. The overall design is robust and inviting, suitable for social gatherings or casual dining. The set is likely constructed from a combination of wood, metal, and vinyl, with foam padding inside the seats.
description: A retro diner booth set with red and white striped padded benches facing a rectangular, glossy table with a central pedestal base.
description_view_0: Front view showing both benches and the full tabletop, highlighting the striped upholstery and table surface.
description_view_1: Side view of a single bench, displaying the solid red exterior and the vertical stripes on the seat back.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing both benches and the table, with upholstery and table stains visible.
description_view_3: Side view of the opposite bench, mirroring view 1 with the same solid red panel and striped seat back.
